creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: crees
Date: Sat May 18 19:24:01 2013
New Revision: 318441
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/318441

Log:
  databases/innobackup: Remove dead port replaced by databases/xtrabackup
  
  PR:		ports/177997
  Approved by:	Gea-Suan Lin <gslin@gslin.org> (maintainer)

Deleted:
  head/databases/innobackup/
Modified:
  head/MOVED
  head/databases/Makefile

Modified: head/MOVED
==============================================================================
--- head/MOVED	Sat May 18 19:01:45 2013	(r318440)
+++ head/MOVED	Sat May 18 19:24:01 2013	(r318441)
@@ -4266,3 +4266,4 @@ science/py-obspy.wav||2013-05-17|Removed
 science/py-obspy.xseed||2013-05-17|Removed: Use science/py-obspy instead
 science/py-obspy-core|science/py-obspy|2013-05-17|Use science/py-obspy instead
 mail/sendmail-ldap|mail/sendmail|2013-05-17|Removed: Use mail/sendmail instead
+databases/innobackup|databases/xtrabackup|2013-05-18|Removed: Use databases/xtrabackup instead

Modified: head/databases/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/databases/Makefile	Sat May 18 19:01:45 2013	(r318440)
+++ head/databases/Makefile	Sat May 18 19:24:01 2013	(r318441)
@@ -111,7 +111,6 @@
     SUBDIR += hs-persistent-sqlite
     SUBDIR += hs-persistent-template
     SUBDIR += hsqldb
-    SUBDIR += innobackup
     SUBDIR += innotop
     SUBDIR += ip4r
     SUBDIR += ipa_sdb
